title: Nether Start
description: A Datapack that makes you starts/spawn in The Nether
body:
![Nether Start Long Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/30xsJD0F/images/92a27e57c93d2402092521e4f109cf91369960c6.png) This is my first Minecraft Datapack simple project that makes you **start/spawn in The Nether**
instead of in The Overworld
This datapack also give you extra 10 second "spawn protection" and also gives you "safety" just in case
if you spawn on lava/magma block or getting suffocated in a block

Do `/reload` if you wanna teleport back again to near 0, 0 in The Nether


This datapack probably works all the way back to 1.16 but I haven't tested it
Also for some reason none upload this kind of datapack here so might as well upload it here lol

## YouTube Video Showcase:
### https://youtu.be/TBCUEkMRcQc
